name: internal-comms
tagline: Helps write internal comms (status reports, newsletters, FAQs, incident reports) by loading the matching guideline file from examples/.
verdict: Clean, low-risk writing-assistance skill: no shell/network/credential activity, concise SKILL.md deferring formatting to on-demand reference files, clear trigger description. Weak spots: no negative-trigger scoping despite a broad catch-all case, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion language anywhere despite broad scope (7 comm types plus a general-comms catch-all for 'anything else').
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
